description: [Riso] Monthly Lesson Count – Calendar Teacher Details
suite: [Riso] Monthly Lesson Count – Calendar Teacher Details

title: [Riso] Calendar Teacher Details – Monthly Lesson Count – Count Shown When Teacher Selected
description: AC 01.3 — Regression Analysis — The Monthly Lesson Count field is visible in the Teacher Details right panel when a teacher is selected on the SF Lesson Calendar.
preconditions:
- Org is Riso OOP; today is April 2026
- Teacher A is assigned to 4 lessons in April 2026 (Published)
- User is logged in as CM or HQ
steps_result:
1. "Navigate to the SF Lesson Calendar"
2. "On the left side teacher panel, select Teacher A"
3. "Observe the Teacher Details right panel"
steps_data:
1. "SF Calendar opens, showing the current month (April 2026)"
2. "Teacher Details panel opens on the right"
3. "Monthly Lesson Count (今月の授業数) field is visible and shows 4"

title: [Riso] Calendar Teacher Details – Monthly Lesson Count – Count Uses Today's Month Not Calendar View Month
description: AC 01.3 — Decision Table — When the calendar shows a different month from today, Monthly Lesson Count still reflects today's month count.
preconditions:
- Org is Riso OOP; today is April 2026
- Teacher B has 6 lessons in April 2026 (Published) and 2 lessons in February 2026 (Published)
steps_result:
1. "Navigate to the SF Lesson Calendar"
2. "Select Teacher B in the left panel"
3. "Navigate the calendar to February 2026 (click previous month twice)"
4. "Observe Teacher B Monthly Lesson Count in Teacher Details"
steps_data:
1. "Calendar opens in April 2026 view"
2. "Teacher Details displays with Monthly Lesson Count = 6 (April count)"
3. "Calendar view changes to show February 2026 lessons"
4. "Count = 6 (still April 2026 count — NOT 2)"

title: [Riso] Calendar Teacher Details – Monthly Lesson Count – Navigation to Next Month Does Not Change Count
description: AC 01.3 — State Transition Testing — Navigating forward in the calendar does not change the Monthly Lesson Count.
preconditions:
- Org is Riso OOP; today is April 2026
- Teacher C has 3 lessons in April 2026 (Published) and 7 lessons in May 2026 (Published)
- Teacher C is selected; count = 3 is visible
steps_result:
1. "Open SF Calendar in April 2026 view; select Teacher C"
2. "Click next month to navigate to May 2026"
3. "Observe Teacher C Monthly Lesson Count"
4. "Click next month again to navigate to June 2026"
5. "Observe Teacher C Monthly Lesson Count"
steps_data:
1. "Teacher Details shows Monthly Lesson Count = 3"
2. "Calendar view changes to May 2026"
3. "Count = 3 (April — unchanged; NOT 7)"
4. "Calendar view changes to June 2026"
5. "Count = 3 (April — still unchanged)"

title: [Riso] Calendar Teacher Details – Monthly Lesson Count – Navigation to Previous Month Does Not Change Count
description: AC 01.3 — State Transition Testing — Navigating backward in the calendar does not change the Monthly Lesson Count.
preconditions:
- Org is Riso OOP; today is April 2026
- Teacher D has 5 lessons in April 2026 (Published) and 1 lesson in March 2026 (Published)
- Teacher D is selected; count = 5 is visible
steps_result:
1. "Open SF Calendar in April 2026 view; select Teacher D"
2. "Click previous month to navigate to March 2026"
3. "Observe Teacher D Monthly Lesson Count"
steps_data:
1. "Teacher Details shows Monthly Lesson Count = 5"
2. "Calendar view changes to March 2026"
3. "Count = 5 (April — unchanged; NOT 1)"

title: [Riso] Calendar Teacher Details – Monthly Lesson Count – Zero Lessons in Today's Month Shows 0
description: AC 01.3 — Boundary Value Analysis — A teacher with no lessons in today's month shows 0 in the Monthly Lesson Count panel, not blank.
preconditions:
- Org is Riso OOP; today is April 2026
- Teacher E has no lessons in April 2026 (no assignments of any status)
- Teacher E has lessons in other months
steps_result:
1. "Navigate to SF Lesson Calendar"
2. "Select Teacher E in the left panel"
3. "Observe the Monthly Lesson Count field"
steps_data:
1. "Calendar opens"
2. "Teacher Details panel opens"
3. "Count = 0 — the field is not blank, not empty, not a dash"

title: [Riso] Calendar Teacher Details – Monthly Lesson Count – Count Includes All Locations
description: AC 01.3 — Decision Table — The count includes lessons from all of the teacher's locations.
preconditions:
- Org is Riso OOP; today is April 2026
- Teacher F has 3 lessons at Location A in April 2026 (Published) and 2 lessons at Location B in April 2026 (Published)
- User is viewing SF Calendar scoped to Location A
steps_result:
1. "Navigate to SF Calendar for Location A"
2. "Select Teacher F in the left panel"
3. "Observe Monthly Lesson Count"
steps_data:
1. "Calendar opens showing Location A lessons"
2. "Teacher Details panel opens"
3. "Count = 5 (3 from Location A + 2 from Location B)"

title: [Riso] Calendar Teacher Details – Monthly Lesson Count – Timezone Boundary Last Day of Month
description: AC 01.3 — Boundary Value Analysis — A lesson on the last day of today's month at late evening local time (JST) is counted in today's month, not the next month.
preconditions:
- Org is Riso OOP (Japan Standard Time, UTC+9); today is April 2026
- Teacher G is assigned to a lesson: Date Apr 30 2026, Time 23:30 JST (= May 1 00:30 UTC), Status: Published
- Teacher G has no other lessons in April or May 2026
steps_result:
1. "Navigate to SF Calendar in April 2026"
2. "Select Teacher G in the left panel"
3. "Observe Monthly Lesson Count"
steps_data:
1. "Calendar displays April 2026"
2. "Teacher Details panel opens"
3. "Count = 1 (April 30 23:30 JST lesson is counted in April, not May)"

title: [Riso] Calendar Teacher Details – Monthly Lesson Count – Switch Between Selected Teachers Updates Count
description: AC 01.3 — State Transition Testing — When multiple teachers are selected on the Calendar and the user switches focus between them, the Monthly Lesson Count in Teacher Details updates to reflect the newly focused teacher's count.
preconditions:
- Org is Riso OOP; today is April 2026
- Teacher A has 4 lessons in April 2026 (Published)
- Teacher B has 9 lessons in April 2026 (Published)
- Both Teacher A and Teacher B are visible in the Calendar left panel
steps_result:
1. "Navigate to the SF Lesson Calendar"
2. "Select Teacher A in the left panel to view details"
3. "Select Teacher B in the left panel to view details"
4. "Select Teacher A again in the left panel"
steps_data:
1. "Calendar opens in April 2026 view"
2. "Teacher Details panel opens for Teacher A; Count = 4"
3. "Teacher Details panel updates to Teacher B; Count = 9"
4. "Teacher Details panel switches back to Teacher A; Count = 4"

title: [Riso] Calendar Teacher Details – Monthly Lesson Count – Each Teacher's Count Is Independent
description: AC 01.3 — Decision Table — When multiple teachers are active as calendar filters, the Monthly Lesson Count shown for each teacher reflects only that individual teacher's lesson count for today's month, not the combined total.
preconditions:
- Org is Riso OOP; today is April 2026
- Teacher A has 4 lessons in April 2026 (Published)
- Teacher B has 9 lessons in April 2026 (Published)
- Both Teacher A and Teacher B are selected as calendar filters
steps_result:
1. "Navigate to SF Calendar; enable both Teacher A and B as calendar filters"
2. "Click on Teacher A's row in the left panel to open details"
3. "Click on Teacher B's row in the left panel to open details"
steps_data:
1. "Calendar shows lessons from both teachers on the grid"
2. "Teacher Details shows Teacher A Monthly Lesson Count = 4 (NOT 13)"
3. "Teacher Details shows Teacher B Monthly Lesson Count = 9 (NOT 13)"

title: [Riso] Calendar Teacher Details – Monthly Lesson Count – Deselect Teacher Clears Panel
description: AC 01.3 — State Transition Testing — When the currently viewed teacher is deselected from the Calendar left panel, the Teacher Details panel (and the Monthly Lesson Count) is no longer shown.
preconditions:
- Org is Riso OOP; today is April 2026
- Teacher A has 4 lessons in April 2026 (Published)
- Teacher A is selected and Teacher Details showing count = 4
steps_result:
1. "Open SF Calendar; select Teacher A to view details"
2. "Deselect Teacher A from the left panel"
steps_data:
1. "Teacher Details panel shows Monthly Lesson Count = 4"
2. "Teacher Details panel closes or hides; Monthly Lesson Count is no longer visible"
